aeo_readiness.summary: The business has a decent foundation for AI visibility but lacks critical elements to ensure AI models cite or recommend them confidently.
quick_wins: Implement LocalBusiness schema markup with detailed business information.
Expand conversational content that answers common HVAC queries directly on the site.

gbp_analysis.summary: The Google Business Profile is well-optimized with positive reviews, photos, and accurate information.
critical_issues: No recent Google Posts to engage users.
Q&A section is inactive and lacks engagement.

nap_citations.summary: NAP consistency is perfect with no issues detected across platforms.
action_items: Maintain current NAP consistency across all directories and listings.
Regularly monitor for any inconsistencies or new listings.

schema_gaps: Missing FAQPage schema despite having FAQ content.
No HowTo schema for common HVAC maintenance or repair tasks.
LocalBusiness schema lacks detailed service area and geo-coordinates.

ai_visibility_gap.primary_gap: Lack of structured data and conversational content limits AI model citations.
ai_visibility_gap.invisible_for: Queries related to 'emergency HVAC repair in Dallas' or 'affordable HVAC solutions'.
ai_visibility_gap.low_hanging_fruit: Adding FAQPage schema and expanding FAQ content to target common user queries.
ai_visibility_gap.authority_opportunity: Positioning as HVAC experts by publishing detailed guides and obtaining relevant certifications.

agency_pitch.hook: Unlock AI-driven leads by making your HVAC expertise undeniable to AI models.
agency_pitch.pain_point: Without AI-ready content and structured data, they miss out on 40% of potential leads from voice and AI search.
agency_pitch.proof_point: Competitors with FAQ schema and conversational content rank higher in AI search results.
agency_pitch.solution: Our AEO strategy integrates structured data, conversational content, and authority signals to make your business the top AI-recommended choice.
agency_pitch.impact_estimate: Expect a 30-40% increase in AI-driven leads within 3-6 months.
agency_pitch.urgency: Waiting means losing ground to competitors who are already optimizing for AI search.

email_subject_line: Dominate AI Search: Your HVAC Business Deserves to Be Found
opening_line: We analyzed your website and identified key opportunities to make your HVAC services irresistible to AI models and potential customers.
cta: Let's schedule a call to discuss how we can optimize your site for AI search and boost your lead generation.
page_title: Heating, Air Conditioning And Ventilation Services - Absolute Comfort Mechanical
